Package com.dlsc.gemsfx.treeview.link

package com.dlsc.gemsfx.treeview.link
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.dlsc.gemsfx.treeview
     
  • Class
    Description
    AbstractLinkStrategy<T>
    Abstract base class for LinkStrategy implementations.
    ClockHandLinkStrategy<T>
    A LinkStrategy that draws a tapered, clock-hand-shaped connector between a parent and a child node.
    CurvedLineLink<T>
    A LinkStrategy that draws a smooth cubic Bézier curve between a parent and a child node, with a directional arrow at the child end.
    LinkStrategy<T>
     
    LogarithmicLink<T>
    A LinkStrategy that draws a link whose path follows a logarithmic curve.
    PolyLineLink<T>
    A LinkStrategy that draws a right-angle polyline connector between a parent and a child node.
    QuadCurveLink<T>
    A LinkStrategy that draws a quadratic Bézier curve between a parent and a child node, with a directional arrow at the child end.
    SimpleCatmullRomLink<T>
    A LinkStrategy that draws a smooth S-curve link using a cubic Bézier approximation of a Catmull-Rom spline.
    SineWaveDecayLink<T>
    A LinkStrategy that draws a link whose path follows a sine-wave easing curve (specifically a quarter-sine from 0 to π/2).
    StraightLineLink<T>
    A LinkStrategy that draws a simple straight line between a parent and a child node, with a directional arrow at the child end.
